pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.7.2 to align with Java 11 support and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 11.
Explicitly add the Servlet API dependency required for WAR packaging and servlet container interaction.
Add the Bean Validation API dependency for input validation support.
Include the Thymeleaf Layout Dialect for improved template structure and reusability.
Add Lombok as an optional dependency to reduce boilerplate code in Java entities.
Add Spring Boot Starter Security to enable authentication and authorization features.
Add Thymeleaf Extras for Spring Security to integrate security tags in Thymeleaf templates.
Change the project packaging type from JAR to WAR for deployment in external servlet containers.
Rename the project name to follow camelCase convention.
Update the project description to reflect the specific context (M2P).
